jokes.text: They were not able to rate it.
jokes.setup: Mac describing the unrated director's cut of Thundergun Express
jokes.punchline: Mac treats 'unrated' as if ratings board couldn't handle rating it rather than standard marketing term
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment - Mac's sincere misunderstanding of basic movie industry terminology reveals his stupidity in an earned way

jokes.text: four extra seconds dedicated solely to the dong shot
jokes.setup: Dennis listing what makes this the best Thanksgiving ever
jokes.punchline: Dennis is specifically excited about extended male nudity in action movie
jokes.explanation: Perfectly captures Dennis's narcissistic sexuality and casual vulgarity with precise, unexpected phrasing

jokes.text: If anything, I should be thanking myself.
jokes.setup: Dennis questioning what he has to be thankful for on Thanksgiving
jokes.punchline: Dennis concludes he deserves credit for his own success
jokes.explanation: Pure Dennis narcissism distilled - turning gratitude into self-congratulation is perfectly in character

jokes.text: We wanted to invest in an emerging market.
jokes.setup: McPoyles explaining why they bought a video store
jokes.punchline: Calling a dying industry an 'emerging market' shows complete business ignorance
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing McPoyle delusion, though not particularly memorable

jokes.text: Then we're gonna corner that market.
jokes.setup: Dennis pointing out video stores are dying
jokes.punchline: Liam doubles down on terrible business logic
jokes.explanation: Decent escalation of the business stupidity but not particularly clever

jokes.text: The eye patch is flesh-colored to make people less uncomfortable.
jokes.setup: Liam explaining his eye patch choice
jokes.punchline: Flesh-colored patch that makes him look like he was born without an eye
jokes.explanation: Good visual comedy concept - the well-intentioned choice that backfires spectacularly

jokes.text: You look like a man who was born without an eye, which is way creepier than a man who lost one.
jokes.setup: The flesh-colored eye patch discussion
jokes.punchline: Dennis explains exactly why it's more disturbing with characteristic bluntness
jokes.explanation: Dennis's cruel honesty delivered with typical lack of social awareness

jokes.text: I have no depth perception!
jokes.setup: Dennis saying losing an eye is badass
jokes.punchline: Liam's practical complaint undermines any coolness
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of romanticized injury with mundane reality

jokes.text: Visual gag of Mac and Dennis struggling with door/video rental
jokes.setup: Attempting to rent video after being banned
jokes.punchline: Physical comedy of them failing at simple task
jokes.explanation: Basic physical comedy, nothing special but functional

jokes.text: We're not having a principle fight. We're having a heat fight.
jokes.setup: Frank asking if they're having a principle fight
jokes.punchline: Charlie's literal interpretation about apartment temperature
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie logic - completely missing the point while being technically accurate

jokes.text: So you got one of those snafus, where you got old assholes-- It's a deadlock.
jokes.setup: Charlie explaining the rent/heat situation
jokes.punchline: Frank and Charlie both offering colorful descriptions of the standoff
jokes.explanation: Good character interaction showing their different speaking styles

jokes.text: Maybe 'cause I got 'em at the gas station, I guess.
jokes.setup: Dennis asking why hoagies smell like gasoline
jokes.punchline: Dee's matter-of-fact response about obviously terrible food choice
jokes.explanation: Good understated delivery of obviously bad decision

jokes.text: Because Gail the Snail works at the Wawa, okay? And we got mad beef.
jokes.setup: Why Dee didn't get sandwiches from the good place
jokes.punchline: Revelation of another ongoing feud affecting their food choices
jokes.explanation: Good setup for episode theme while referencing show continuity

jokes.text: We got too many beefs all over town. It's jamming us up.
jokes.setup: The accumulation of various conflicts
jokes.punchline: Dennis treating their social conflicts like logistical problems
jokes.explanation: Excellent premise establishment - treating social dysfunction as urban planning problem

jokes.text: The Pilgrims and Indians had beef. So what did they do? They got together, they sat at a table, they ate some delicious food and they squashed that beef
jokes.setup: Mac explaining his Thanksgiving peace plan
jokes.punchline: Completely sanitized and wrong version of colonial history
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mac - sincere belief in completely wrong historical narrative delivered with confidence

jokes.text: I also invited Charlie's mom, my mom and my dad, but they didn't want to come.
jokes.setup: Mac explaining his family invitation strategy
jokes.punchline: Casual revelation that literally no one wanted to come to their Thanksgiving
jokes.explanation: Perfectly understated revelation of how universally disliked they are by their own families

jokes.text: The Indians, they've got sports teams, they've got casinos. They're a very celebrated people.
jokes.setup: Debate over who won between Pilgrims and Indians
jokes.punchline: Frank's completely tone-deaf assessment of Native American 'success'
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy of Frank's oblivious perspective on historical genocide

jokes.text: Why do you always want people to sign creepy documents?
jokes.setup: Dennis presenting a peace treaty to sign
jokes.punchline: Frank identifying Dennis's recurring bizarre behavior pattern
jokes.explanation: Great callback that highlights Dennis's control freak tendencies across episodes

jokes.text: Well, Frank, once something's in writing, that means it's set in stone. Then no one can do anything to stop me.
jokes.setup: Frank questioning the document obsession
jokes.punchline: Dennis revealing his sinister motivation for contracts
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis moment - accidentally revealing his manipulative nature while thinking he sounds reasonable

jokes.text: You said we're squashing beef. I thought it would be part of the ceremony to have squash and beef.
jokes.setup: Discussion of squashing beef metaphorically
jokes.punchline: Charlie's literal interpretation requiring actual squash and beef
jokes.explanation: Excellent Charlie logic - missing metaphors entirely and creating absurd literal solutions

jokes.text: And after we do that, we're going to wipe the slate clean.
jokes.setup: Mac describing ceremonial hatchet burying
jokes.punchline: Mac adding another literal interpretation of metaphor
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the literal metaphor theme but less inventive than Charlie's version

jokes.text: Wait, no, guys, look, this is all very on the nose and totally unnecessary.
jokes.setup: Mac and Charlie's elaborate literal ceremony plans
jokes.punchline: Dennis being the voice of reason while having his own obsessive document plan
jokes.explanation: Good irony of Dennis criticizing others' over-elaborate plans while being equally obsessive

jokes.text: Visual gag: Dee awkwardly approaching Liam alone while others watch
jokes.setup: Dennis telling Dee to 'break the ice' with hostile guests
jokes.punchline: Dee being forced into uncomfortable social situation while others watch
jokes.explanation: Standard cringe setup. Functional but predictable social awkwardness.

jokes.text: The skin tone is a-- is a-- a good match. Oh, well, when you move the other one, I guess I can tell a little bit, if I'm being honest.
jokes.setup: Liam asking if his fake eye looks real
jokes.punchline: Dee's increasingly uncomfortable 'honesty' about his deformity
jokes.explanation: Good cringe escalation as Dee digs herself deeper trying to be polite

jokes.text: Hey, turkeys, gobble, gobble.
jokes.setup: Cricket arriving uninvited to Thanksgiving
jokes.punchline: Cricket's pathetic attempt at Thanksgiving-themed greeting
jokes.explanation: Good Cricket character moment - trying too hard to fit in with desperate enthusiasm

jokes.text: I was a priest before I got involved with you guys.
jokes.setup: Gang claiming they don't have beef with Cricket
jokes.punchline: Cricket pointing out they ruined his entire life and career
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark callback highlighting the gang's complete destruction of Cricket's life

jokes.text: You can eat it off the floor like a dog, how 'bout that?
jokes.setup: Cricket offering to eat gristle
jokes.punchline: Mac making it even more dehumanizing
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Cricket's debasement showing Mac's casual cruelty

jokes.text: What's with the standing? You're lording. Some kind of a status thing? A power move? Some kind of power play?
jokes.setup: Mac and Dennis standing while McPoyles sit
jokes.punchline: Liam's paranoid spiral about power dynamics
jokes.explanation: Good McPoyle paranoia escalating a normal situation into conspiracy theory

jokes.text: Bring it down. Just bring it down on the haunches. Haunch it.
jokes.setup: McPoyles demanding Mac and Dennis sit down
jokes.punchline: Liam's weird terminology for squatting/sitting
jokes.explanation: Great McPoyle weirdness - turning 'squat' into bizarre command 'haunch it'

jokes.text: I thought I was getting an eye.
jokes.setup: Mac and Dennis presenting peace treaty as gift
jokes.punchline: Liam's completely unreasonable expectation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurd expectation - treating human organ replacement as reasonable gift exchange

jokes.text: Where the Christ would we get an eye? And if we did get an eye, how would we attach it to you?
jokes.setup: Liam expecting them to give him an eye
jokes.punchline: Mac's logical questions about impossible eye procurement and surgery
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation pointing out practical impossibility of Liam's demand

jokes.text: Give him your eye.
jokes.setup: Discussion of where to get an eye for Liam
jokes.punchline: Dennis casually suggesting Mac sacrifice his own eye
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis moment - casually suggesting extreme sacrifice from someone else with zero empathy

jokes.text: It's not grade-A meat. You know, I'm not gonna get grade-A meat.
jokes.setup: Hwang commenting that meat doesn't smell right
jokes.punchline: Charlie casually admitting to serving low-quality meat
jokes.explanation: Good Charlie logic - completely missing the problem with serving bad meat to guests

jokes.text: Snail, what the hell are you doing here? Who invited you?
jokes.setup: Gail the Snail arriving at Thanksgiving
jokes.punchline: Dee's horror at seeing her nemesis
jokes.explanation: Standard Dee reaction to unwanted person, functional but not special

jokes.text: Listen, could you just swallow your spit and then breathe, and then we can talk?
jokes.setup: Snail making gross mouth sounds
jokes.punchline: Dee's disgust at Snail's basic bodily functions
jokes.explanation: Good gross-out comedy showing why Snail is called Snail

jokes.text: I want her to be my best friend, yo.
jokes.setup: Discussion of what Snail wants from Dee
jokes.punchline: Snail's pathetic and unrealistic desire
jokes.explanation: Good pathetic character moment showing Snail's delusion about their relationship

jokes.text: These crackers need more salt. I agree. Okay, well, they're extremely salty.
jokes.setup: Charlie trying to find common ground between Frank and Hwang
jokes.punchline: They agree the crackers need more salt when they're already extremely salty
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist agreement on obviously wrong assessment

jokes.text: Doctors are shit. Goddamn medicine men, trying to tell me how to eat my food.
jokes.setup: Hwang mentioning doctor says no salt
jokes.punchline: Frank's angry rant against medical professionals
jokes.explanation: Typical Frank anti-authority rant, in character but not particularly clever

jokes.text: I could give the whole month's rent right here. I'll take it. But I'm not gonna do it, because I'm not gonna let you beat me
jokes.setup: Frank offering to pay rent to settle dispute
jokes.punchline: Frank immediately taking it back out of pure stubbornness
jokes.explanation: Perfect Frank moment - sabotaging reasonable solution purely out of ego

jokes.text: Yeah, but I think it might be better if you're blind anyway. You know, it's gonna heighten all your other senses.
jokes.setup: Liam saying he only has one working eye
jokes.punchline: Dennis suggesting blindness would be an improvement
jokes.explanation: Good Dennis cruelty disguised as helpful advice about disability

jokes.text: Who's this jabroni? I have no idea. Slam the door on his face. See you, Bozo.
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce arriving at door
jokes.punchline: Immediate dismissal and door slamming of innocent person
jokes.explanation: Standard gang rudeness to strangers, functional but not exceptional

jokes.text: Are my kids in there? Somebody wrote me a note and said that my kids wanted to see me. I haven't seen 'em since my wife left me.
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce showing up confused
jokes.punchline: Heartbreaking revelation of separated father hoping to see his children
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark comedy - gang's scheme accidentally giving false hope to desperate father

jokes.text: My kids aren't really here, are they? No. No, I lied about that. Thank God.
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce realizing kids aren't there
jokes.punchline: His relief at not having to see his own children
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark twist - subverts expectation of heartbroken father into deadbeat relief

jokes.text: What a piece of shit that guy is. Yeah, he's a real piece of shit, yeah.
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce revealing he's glad not to see his kids
jokes.punchline: Mac agreeing that Wrong Bruce is terrible while being equally awful himself
jokes.explanation: Good irony of Mac judging someone else's moral failings while being equally terrible

jokes.text: I once broke into Dee's apartment and sniffed on her panties.
jokes.setup: Dennis asking Bill to admit something to someone
jokes.punchline: Bill confessing to stalking and sexual harassment instead of relevant issue
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection - completely wrong confession that creates new problems

jokes.text: The only thing I remember from that night... is my sponsor Frank giving me the green light to get shit-housed.
jokes.setup: Bill being confronted about spiking punch at wedding
jokes.punchline: Revealing Frank was his AA sponsor who told him to drink
jokes.explanation: Excellent revelation showing Frank's terrible sponsorship and shifting blame

jokes.text: Hey, Frank, I'm giving this guy a handy under the table. Are you jealous?
jokes.setup: Chaotic Thanksgiving dinner scene
jokes.punchline: Snail casually announcing sexual act at dinner table
jokes.explanation: Good shock humor showing how inappropriate Snail is even in inappropriate setting

jokes.text: She's mashing it. She does that. I'm very aroused.
jokes.setup: Snail giving someone a handjob at dinner
jokes.punchline: Frank and Hwang's matter-of-fact reactions to public sexual act
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with Frank's typical inappropriate response and Hwang's surprising participation

jokes.text: Oh. I have a horrible drug problem. You want to do a bump here?
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce explaining why he doesn't see his kids
jokes.punchline: Immediately offering drugs after admitting drug problem
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation showing complete lack of self-awareness about addiction

jokes.text: I'll have a few of those delicious nose clams.
jokes.setup: Wrong Bruce offering cocaine
jokes.punchline: Frank's bizarre euphemism for cocaine
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Frank wordplay - 'nose clams' is perfectly disgusting and memorable

jokes.text: What, I can't have squash? I can't have blow?
jokes.setup: Gang trying to control what Cricket consumes
jokes.punchline: Cricket equating dinner vegetables with cocaine
jokes.explanation: Good Cricket logic treating food and drugs as equivalent basic needs

jokes.text: Food fight! Food fight! I guess.
jokes.setup: Complete chaos breaking out at Thanksgiving dinner
jokes.punchline: Charlie's halfhearted attempt to start food fight during serious conflict
jokes.explanation: Good Charlie moment - completely missing the severity of situation

jokes.text: You owe me an eye, Frank.
jokes.setup: Physical altercation breaking out
jokes.punchline: Liam still focused on eye compensation during fight
jokes.explanation: Good callback showing Liam's single-minded focus even during chaos

jokes.text: Why is my room on fire? I may have started a money fire.
jokes.setup: Mac discovering his room is on fire
jokes.punchline: Frank's casual admission to starting fire with money
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - Frank's petty gesture causing actual disaster

jokes.text: They're definitely gonna burn to death. Guys, nobody's gonna burn, all right? There's a fire escape.
jokes.setup: Gang locking party guests in burning building
jokes.punchline: Dennis's casual dismissal of potential deaths
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis - minimizing attempted murder with bureaucratic logic

jokes.text: I feel like we're just creating more beef. Which we will not resolve.
jokes.setup: Acknowledging their plan made everything worse
jokes.punchline: Dennis's immediate decision to abandon all responsibility
jokes.explanation: Excellent Dennis moment - acknowledging problems while refusing to fix them

jokes.text: The best thing to do with a beef is jam it deep down inside and then press forward.
jokes.setup: Gang's realization about conflict resolution
jokes.punchline: Dennis's psychopathic approach to emotional problems
jokes.explanation: Brilliant Dennis philosophy - toxic masculinity as life strategy with perfect delivery

jokes.text: I hate people who are different than me, you know? Why pretend?
jokes.setup: Gang's thanksgiving conclusion
jokes.punchline: Dennis's honest admission of intolerance as virtue
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dennis finale - treating bigotry as refreshing honesty with chilling casualness

jokes.text: Who's got me? Man down. I'm right back here, guys. Who's got me? Guys? Hello? Hello?
jokes.setup: Everyone escaping the fire
jokes.punchline: Snail left behind calling for help no one will provide
jokes.explanation: Good dark ending showing Snail's isolation - everyone abandons her as expected
